title: Wenchang Publish Check
summary: Builds publish packages and verifies long-form images, real card files, manifests, human gates, and release readiness.
user_needs: generate platform-specific titles, summaries, captions, tags, and image decisions
prepare a multi-platform draft before image production
verify real images, cards manifests, public URLs, and blockers before publishing
keep publish-ready card packages in review until visual QA and human confirmation pass
